description_long: This is a ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head with two distinct ends: one flat striking face and one rounded peen. The head is securely mounted on a smoothly contoured wooden handle, which displays a natural wood grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for comfortable grip. The metallic head has a matte to semi-gloss finish, with no visible rust, scratches, or dents, indicating it is in pristine condition. The handle appears to be made from a single piece of hardwood, smoothly finished and free of any grip enhancements or texturing. No brand markings, logos, or additional accessories are visible on the hammer. The overall design is classic and utilitarian, suitable for metalworking, carpentry, or general urban tool use.
description: A classic ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a smooth, curved wooden handle, both in pristine condition and free of markings or accessories.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, clearly displaying the flat striking face and rounded peen of the head, as well as the full length and gentle curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the top, showing the narrow profile of the handle and the oval shape of the head, with both the flat and rounded ends visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view of the hammer, again highlighting the dual-ended head and the smooth, contoured wooden handle.
description_view_3: The hammer is viewed from the bottom, emphasizing the slim handle and the symmetrical alignment of the head's two ends.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for comfortable grip, no additional grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head made of steel, featuring one flat striking face and one rounded peen, both ends smoothly finished.
